subject: (no subject)
body:
Have julie organize a clean up crew to walk the roads, and clean 15 feet perside,,cactus,, dead, acacia etc.. ALL he roads,, . Tell chapman to get rid of the pywood at the gym,, he did 90% now finsish,, chapman should look at the drain built in the road to see how sloppy a job was done, julie and brinsley must plant in a more dense fashion ,, otherwise it looks like hairplugs,, , plant more rather than less, please have them cut down the plants so that I can see from my outdoor bathtub
